title: Tiger Prawn Fattoush
description: A delicious and refreshing Middle Eastern-inspired salad featuring succulent tiger prawns and crispy flatbread.

ingredients.name: Fattoush
ingredients.notes: crispy flatbread, torn into bite-sized pieces

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the torn fattoush, cucumber, olives, and parsley.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and olive oil.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Add the crispy sumac and toss again to coat.
5. Cook the tiger prawns in a hot skillet with a little oil until pink and cooked through.
6. Add the cooked prawns to the salad and toss to combine.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
